title: The Curious Boy and the Whispering Woods

scenes.text: As soon as Timmy stepped into the Whispering Woods, he felt a gentle breeze carrying whispers of secrets yet untold. He walked deeper, his heart pounding with curiosity and excitement.
scenes.image_description: Timmy taking his first steps into the woods, sunlight filtering through leaves

scenes.text: Soon, he met Oliver, a wise old owl perched on a branch. 'Hello there,' hooted Oliver, 'you're new here.' Timmy explained his adventure, and Oliver offered to guide him.
scenes.image_description: Timmy looking up at Oliver the Owl with wide-eyed wonder

scenes.text: Together, they discovered a hidden grove filled with glowing flowers. Timmy gasped in awe as their soft light illuminated his face. He felt small but incredibly special.
scenes.image_description: Timmy and Oliver standing amidst the glowing flowers, bathed in warm light
